---
title: ""
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
lake_data <- st_read(
  "/hpc/home/tvc11/HydroLAKES_polys_v10_shp"
)
grid_025deg <- st_read(
  "/hpc/home/tvc11/AITreeMapping/05grids/malawiGIS/malawi_grid_025deg.shp"
)
 
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
 
# Make sure lake CRS matches grid CRS
lake_data <- st_transform(lake_data, st_crs(grid_025deg))
 
# Keep only lakes around the Malawi grid extent
lake_malawi <- st_crop(lake_data, st_bbox(grid_025deg))
 
grid_025deg <- grid_025deg %>%
  mutate(
    grid_num = str_extract(tile_id, "\\d+$")
  )
 
# Create label points inside each polygon
grid_label <- st_point_on_surface(grid_025deg)
 
# Plot map
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = lake_malawi,
    fill = "#9ecae1",
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = grid_025deg, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = NA, color ="red", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = grid_label,
    aes(label = grid_num),
    size = 3,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )
 
p
 
ggsave(
  filename = "D:/TreeBiomass/00DataPlus/00tutorials/malawi_grid_025deg_id_map.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 9.55,
  height = 8.24,
  dpi = 300
)
```
